ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the API provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the API provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update on the provider's configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the API provider configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated API provider */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Name of the configuration attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting's purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the setting */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the value */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the setting */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the setting */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_settings_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES api_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection entry */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated API provider */,
  "connection_timeout" TEXT /* Timeout for connecting to the provider */,
  "pool_timeout" TEXT /* Timeout for acquiring a connection from the pool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the connection entry was created */,
  "max_connections" INTEGER /* Maximum number of connections allowed */,
  "min_connections" INTEGER /* Minimum number of connections */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES api_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated API provider */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action or the state before and after */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "status_before" TEXT /* Status before the action */,
  "status_after" TEXT /* Status after the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES api_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, viewer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user's details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role's details were last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
